subject: Computer Networking
title: Uninterruptible Power Supplies
description: Learn Uninterruptible Power Supplies in one minute.

hook.text: Power blinks for half a second. Your PC reboots, but a data center server keeps running. Thank the UPS.

buildup.text: A UPS provides battery backup the instant mains power fails. The switchover is instantaneous.

discovery.text: UPS units also clean incoming power: filtering spikes, sags, and noise that damage electronics.

twist.text: A UPS doesn't run servers for hours. It bridges 5-30 minutes until diesel generators take over.

climax.text: Data centers use room-sized UPS with thousands of batteries. Some use spinning flywheels instead.

punchline.text: A UPS buys time when power dies. Seconds matter in a data center.

quiz.question: What is the primary role of a UPS in a data center?
options: Bridge the gap between power loss and generator startup
Cool the servers during high load
